typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		grievance_id as string,
		company as string,
		deptid as string,
		grievance_type as string,
		grievance_status as string,
		emplid as string,
		grievance_dt as timestamp,
		status_dt as timestamp,
		union_cd as string,
		filed_by as string,
		contract_ref as string,
		business_unit as string,
		final_resolution as string,
		location as string,
		amt as integer,
		descrlong as string,
		resltn_comm as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT     grievance_id,  	case when company = \'\' then \'000\' else company end as company,     case when union_cd = \'\' then \'0\' else union_cd end as union_cd,     rtrim(case when deptid = \'\' then \'0\' else deptid end) as deptid,      filed_by,      grievance_dt,      contract_ref,      grievance_status,      grievance_type,      status_dt,      case when business_unit = \'\' then \'0\' else business_unit end as business_unit,      final_resolution,      location,      amt,      descrlong,      resltn_comm,      case when (emplid = \'\' or emplid is null) then \'0\' else rtrim(emplid) end as emplid FROM [ps_hcm].[ps_grievance] where grievance_dt>=\'2005-01-01\'',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource	source(output(
		business_unit_key as integer,
		business_unit as string,
		active_inactive as string,
		business_unit_description as string,
		business_unit_short as string,
		business_unit_type as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from hr.dim_business_unit',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> buLKPTABLE	source(output(
		company_key as short,
		company as string,
		company_name as string,
		company_type as string,
		effective_from as timestamp,
		effective_to as timestamp
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from hr.dim_company',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupcompanyLKPTABLE	source(output(
		department_key as integer,
		setid as string,
		deptid as string,
		effdt as timestamp,
		eff_status as string,
		descr as string,
		descrshort as string,
		budget_deptid as string,
		ph_func_acct as string,
		department as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from hr.dim_department',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupdepartmentLKPTABLE	source(output(
		employee_key as integer,
		emplid as string,
		name as string,
		initial as string,
		prefix as string,
		last_name as string,
		first_name as string,
		middle_name as string,
		country as string,
		address1 as string,
		address2 as string,
		address3 as string,
		address4 as string,
		city as string,
		state as string,
		postal as string,
		phone as string,
		per_status as string,
		orig_hire_date as timestamp,
		sex as string,
		age_status as string,
		mar_status as string,
		mar_status_dt as timestamp,
		birthdate as timestamp,
		us_work_eligibility as string,
		military_status as string,
		smoker as string,
		smoker_dt as timestamp,
		bilingualism_code as string,
		health_care_state as string,
		lang_cd as string,
		disabled as string,
		country_code as string,
		effective_from as date,
		efective_to as date
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from hr.dim_employee',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupemployeeLKPTABLE	source(output(
		grievance_status_key as integer,
		grievance_status as string,
		effective_from as timestamp,
		version as integer,
		effective_status as string,
		grievance_status_long_description as string,
		grievance_status_description as string,
		effective_to as timestamp
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from hr.dim_grievance_status',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupgrievancestatusLKPTABLE	source(output(
		grievance_type_key as integer,
		grievance_type as string,
		effective_status as string,
		grievance_type_description as string,
		grievance_type_short_description as string,
		effective_from as timestamp,
		effective_to as timestamp
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from hr.dim_grievance_type',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupgrievancetypeLKPTABLE	source(output(
		date_key as integer,
		date as date,
		date_text as string,
		date_text_yyyymmdd as string,
		date_string as string,
		fiscal_year as string,
		fiscal_year_short as string,
		fiscal_year_first_year as string,
		fiscal_year_final_year as string,
		fiscal_quarter as string,
		fiscal_quarter_moh as string,
		fiscal_quarter_old as string,
		fiscal_year_period as string,
		fiscal_year_final_year_period as string,
		fiscal_year_final_year_short_period as string,
		fiscal_period as string,
		year as string,
		quarter as string,
		month as string,
		month_sort_order as long,
		month_short as string,
		month_year as string,
		weekday as string,
		weekday_sort_order as long,
		ucd_day as string,
		stat_day as string,
		weekend_day as string,
		workload_year as string,
		workload_period as string,
		updated as timestamp,
		PhyRptFiscalQuarter as string,
		week_number as short,
		week_of as date,
		fin_year as string,
		fin_year_period as string,
		fin_year_short_period as string,
		month_number as long,
		weekday_number as long,
		cdc_epidemiology_week as long,
		cdc_epidemiology_year as string,
		cdc_flu_season as string,
		pay_period as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from shared.dim_date',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupgrievancedateLKPTABLE	source(output(
		date_key as integer,
		date as timestamp,
		date_text as string,
		date_text_yyyymmdd as string,
		date_string as string,
		fiscal_year as string,
		fiscal_year_short as string,
		fiscal_year_first_year as string,
		fiscal_year_final_year as string,
		fiscal_quarter as string,
		fiscal_quarter_moh as string,
		fiscal_quarter_old as string,
		fiscal_year_period as string,
		fiscal_year_final_year_period as string,
		fiscal_year_final_year_short_period as string,
		fiscal_period as string,
		year as string,
		quarter as string,
		month as string,
		month_sort_order as long,
		month_short as string,
		month_year as string,
		weekday as string,
		weekday_sort_order as long,
		ucd_day as string,
		stat_day as string,
		weekend_day as string,
		workload_year as string,
		workload_period as string,
		updated as timestamp,
		PhyRptFiscalQuarter as string,
		week_number as short,
		week_of as date,
		fin_year as string,
		fin_year_period as string,
		fin_year_short_period as string,
		month_number as long,
		weekday_number as long,
		cdc_epidemiology_week as long,
		cdc_epidemiology_year as string,
		cdc_flu_season as string,
		pay_period as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from shared.dim_date',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupstatusdateLKPTABLE	source(output(
		union_key as short,
		union_cd as string,
		effective_status as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT 	DU.union_key,  	DU.union_cd,  	DU.effective_status FROM hr.dim_union as DU INNER JOIN ( 	SELECT union_cd, max(effective_from) as eff 	FROM hr.dim_union as dim_union_1 	GROUP BY union_cd ) as u_max  on DU.union_cd = u_max.union_cd  	and DU.effective_from = u_max.eff WHERE  DU.effective_status = \'a\' ORDER BY DU.union_key',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupunionLKPTABLE
OLEDBSource,LookupcompanyLKPTABLE lookup(OLEDBSource@company == LookupcompanyLKPTABLE@company,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookupcompany
Lookupcompany select(mapColumn(
		grievance_id = grievance_id,
		company = OLEDBSource@company,
		deptid = deptid,
		grievance_type = grievance_type,
		grievance_status = grievance_status,
		emplid = emplid,
		grievance_dt = grievance_dt,
		status_dt = status_dt,
		union_cd = union_cd,
		filed_by = filed_by,
		contract_ref = contract_ref,
		business_unit = business_unit,
		final_resolution = final_resolution,
		location = location,
		amt = amt,
		descrlong = descrlong,
		resltn_comm = resltn_comm,
		company_key = company_key,
		company_name = company_name,
		company_type = company_type,
		effective_from = effective_from,
		effective_to = effective_to
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupcompanySelect
LookupcompanySelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupcompanyIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupcompanyIsMatch@Match,LookupunionLKPTABLE lookup(LookupcompanyIsMatch@Match@union_cd == LookupunionLKPTABLE@union_cd,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookupunion
Lookupunion select(mapColumn(
		union_key = union_key,
		union_cd = LookupunionLKPTABLE@union_cd,
		effective_status = effective_status,
		company_key = company_key,
		grievance_id = grievance_id,
		company = company,
		deptid = deptid,
		grievance_type = grievance_type,
		grievance_status = grievance_status,
		emplid = emplid,
		grievance_dt = grievance_dt,
		status_dt = status_dt,
		filed_by = filed_by,
		contract_ref = contract_ref,
		business_unit = business_unit,
		final_resolution = final_resolution,
		location = location,
		amt = amt,
		descrlong = descrlong,
		resltn_comm = resltn_comm
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupunionSelect
LookupunionSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupunionIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupunionIsMatch@Match,LookupdepartmentLKPTABLE lookup(LookupunionIsMatch@Match@deptid == LookupdepartmentLKPTABLE@deptid,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookupdepartment
Lookupdepartment select(mapColumn(
		union_key = union_key,
		company_key = company_key,
		grievance_id = grievance_id,
		company = company,
		deptid = LookupdepartmentLKPTABLE@deptid,
		grievance_type = grievance_type,
		grievance_status = grievance_status,
		emplid = emplid,
		grievance_dt = grievance_dt,
		status_dt = status_dt,
		union_cd = union_cd,
		filed_by = filed_by,
		contract_ref = contract_ref,
		business_unit = business_unit,
		final_resolution = final_resolution,
		location = location,
		amt = amt,
		descrlong = descrlong,
		resltn_comm = resltn_comm,
		department_key = department_key,
		setid = setid,
		effdt = effdt,
		eff_status = eff_status,
		descr = descr,
		descrshort = descrshort,
		budget_deptid = budget_deptid,
		ph_func_acct = ph_func_acct,
		department = department
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupdepartmentSelect
LookupdepartmentSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupdepartmentIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupdepartmentIsMatch@Match,LookupgrievancestatusLKPTABLE lookup(LookupdepartmentIsMatch@Match@grievance_status == LookupgrievancestatusLKPTABLE@grievance_status,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookupgrievancestatus
Lookupgrievancestatus select(mapColumn(
		grievance_status_key = grievance_status_key,
		grievance_status = LookupgrievancestatusLKPTABLE@grievance_status,
		effective_from = effective_from,
		version = version,
		effective_status = effective_status,
		grievance_status_long_description = grievance_status_long_description,
		grievance_status_description = grievance_status_description,
		effective_to = effective_to,
		department_key = department_key,
		union_key = union_key,
		company_key = company_key,
		grievance_id = grievance_id,
		company = company,
		deptid = deptid,
		grievance_type = grievance_type,
		emplid = emplid,
		grievance_dt = grievance_dt,
		status_dt = status_dt,
		union_cd = union_cd,
		filed_by = filed_by,
		contract_ref = contract_ref,
		business_unit = business_unit,
		final_resolution = final_resolution,
		location = location,
		amt = amt,
		descrlong = descrlong,
		resltn_comm = resltn_comm
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupgrievancestatusSelect
LookupgrievancestatusSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupgrievancestatusIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupgrievancestatusIsMatch@Match,LookupgrievancetypeLKPTABLE lookup(LookupgrievancestatusIsMatch@Match@grievance_type == LookupgrievancetypeLKPTABLE@grievance_type,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookupgrievancetype
Lookupgrievancetype select(mapColumn(
		grievance_type_key = grievance_type_key,
		grievance_type = LookupgrievancetypeLKPTABLE@grievance_type,
		effective_status = effective_status,
		grievance_type_description = grievance_type_description,
		grievance_type_short_description = grievance_type_short_description,
		effective_from = effective_from,
		effective_to = effective_to,
		grievance_status_key = grievance_status_key,
		department_key = department_key,
		union_key = union_key,
		company_key = company_key,
		grievance_id = grievance_id,
		company = company,
		deptid = deptid,
		grievance_status = grievance_status,
		emplid = emplid,
		grievance_dt = grievance_dt,
		status_dt = status_dt,
		union_cd = union_cd,
		filed_by = filed_by,
		contract_ref = contract_ref,
		business_unit = business_unit,
		final_resolution = final_resolution,
		location = location,
		amt = amt,
		descrlong = descrlong,
		resltn_comm = resltn_comm
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupgrievancetypeSelect
LookupgrievancetypeSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupgrievancetypeIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupgrievancetypeIsMatch@Match,LookupemployeeLKPTABLE lookup(LookupgrievancetypeIsMatch@Match@emplid == LookupemployeeLKPTABLE@emplid,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookupemployee
Lookupemployee select(mapColumn(
		grievance_type_key = grievance_type_key,
		grievance_status_key = grievance_status_key,
		department_key = department_key,
		union_key = union_key,
		company_key = company_key,
		grievance_id = grievance_id,
		company = company,
		deptid = deptid,
		grievance_type = grievance_type,
		grievance_status = grievance_status,
		emplid = LookupemployeeLKPTABLE@emplid,
		grievance_dt = grievance_dt,
		status_dt = status_dt,
		union_cd = union_cd,
		filed_by = filed_by,
		contract_ref = contract_ref,
		business_unit = business_unit,
		final_resolution = final_resolution,
		location = location,
		amt = amt,
		descrlong = descrlong,
		resltn_comm = resltn_comm,
		employee_key = employee_key,
		name = name,
		initial = initial,
		prefix = prefix,
		last_name = last_name,
		first_name = first_name,
		middle_name = middle_name,
		country = country,
		address1 = address1,
		address2 = address2,
		address3 = address3,
		address4 = address4,
		city = city,
		state = state,
		postal = postal,
		phone = phone,
		per_status = per_status,
		orig_hire_date = orig_hire_date,
		sex = sex,
		age_status = age_status,
		mar_status = mar_status,
		mar_status_dt = mar_status_dt,
		birthdate = birthdate,
		us_work_eligibility = us_work_eligibility,
		military_status = military_status,
		smoker = smoker,
		smoker_dt = smoker_dt,
		bilingualism_code = bilingualism_code,
		health_care_state = health_care_state,
		lang_cd = lang_cd,
		disabled = disabled,
		country_code = country_code,
		effective_from = effective_from,
		efective_to = efective_to
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupemployeeSelect
LookupemployeeSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupemployeeIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupemployeeIsMatch@Match,LookupgrievancedateLKPTABLE lookup(grievance_dt == date,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookupgrievancedate
Lookupgrievancedate split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupgrievancedateIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupgrievancedateIsMatch@NotMatch select(mapColumn(
		grievance_date_key = date_key,
		employee_key = employee_key,
		grievance_type_key = grievance_type_key,
		grievance_status_key = grievance_status_key,
		department_key = department_key,
		union_key = union_key,
		company_key = company_key,
		grievance_id = grievance_id,
		company = company,
		deptid = deptid,
		grievance_type = grievance_type,
		grievance_status = grievance_status,
		emplid = emplid,
		grievance_dt = grievance_dt,
		status_dt = status_dt,
		union_cd = union_cd,
		filed_by = filed_by,
		contract_ref = contract_ref,
		business_unit = business_unit,
		final_resolution = final_resolution,
		location = location,
		amt = amt,
		descrlong = descrlong,
		resltn_comm = resltn_comm
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupgrievancedateREFORMAT
LookupgrievancedateREFORMAT,LookupstatusdateLKPTABLE lookup(status_dt == date,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookupstatusdate
Lookupstatusdate split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupstatusdateIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupstatusdateIsMatch@NotMatch select(mapColumn(
		status_date_key = date_key,
		grievance_date_key = grievance_date_key,
		employee_key = employee_key,
		grievance_type_key = grievance_type_key,
		grievance_status_key = grievance_status_key,
		department_key = department_key,
		union_key = union_key,
		company_key = company_key,
		grievance_id = grievance_id,
		company = company,
		deptid = deptid,
		grievance_type = grievance_type,
		grievance_status = grievance_status,
		emplid = emplid,
		grievance_dt = grievance_dt,
		status_dt = status_dt,
		union_cd = union_cd,
		filed_by = filed_by,
		contract_ref = contract_ref,
		business_unit = business_unit,
		final_resolution = final_resolution,
		location = location,
		amt = amt,
		descrlong = descrlong,
		resltn_comm = resltn_comm
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupstatusdateREFORMAT
LookupstatusdateREFORMAT,buLKPTABLE lookup(LookupstatusdateREFORMAT@business_unit == buLKPTABLE@business_unit,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> bu
bu select(mapColumn(
		business_unit_key = business_unit_key,
		business_unit = buLKPTABLE@business_unit,
		active_inactive = active_inactive,
		business_unit_description = business_unit_description,
		business_unit_short = business_unit_short,
		business_unit_type = business_unit_type,
		status_date_key = status_date_key,
		grievance_date_key = grievance_date_key,
		employee_key = employee_key,
		grievance_type_key = grievance_type_key,
		grievance_status_key = grievance_status_key,
		department_key = department_key,
		union_key = union_key,
		company_key = company_key,
		grievance_id = grievance_id,
		company = company,
		deptid = deptid,
		grievance_type = grievance_type,
		grievance_status = grievance_status,
		emplid = emplid,
		grievance_dt = grievance_dt,
		status_dt = status_dt,
		union_cd = union_cd,
		filed_by = filed_by,
		contract_ref = contract_ref,
		final_resolution = final_resolution,
		location = location,
		amt = amt,
		descrlong = descrlong,
		resltn_comm = resltn_comm
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> buSelect
buSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> buIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
buIsMatch@Match derive(grievance_status_key = toString(iif(isNull(grievance_status_key), (iif(isNull(grievance_status), 0, -(1))), grievance_status_key)),
		status_date_key = toString(iif(isNull(status_date_key), 19000101, status_date_key)),
		company_key = toString(iif(isNull(company_key), (iif(isNull(company), 0, -(1))), toInteger(company_key))),
		business_unit_key = toString(iif(isNull(business_unit_key), (iif(isNull(business_unit), 0, -(1))), business_unit_key)),
		grievance_type_key = toString(iif(isNull(grievance_type_key), (iif(isNull(grievance_type), 0, -(1))), grievance_type_key)),
		employee_key = toString(iif(isNull(employee_key), (iif(emplid == '0', 0, -(1))), employee_key)),
		grievance_date_key = toString(iif(isNull(grievance_date_key), 19000101, grievance_date_key)),
		union_key = toString(iif(isNull(union_key), (iif(isNull(union_cd), 0, -(1))), toInteger(union_key))),
		department_key = toString(iif(isNull(department_key), (iif((deptid == '0' || business_unit == '0'), 0, -(1))), department_key))) ~> Fixnullkeys
Fixnullkeys sink(input(
		amount as integer,
		grievance_status_key as integer,
